title: Build contrast-audit-owl: CI-wired WCAG gate Koma
description: design-token-cli audit --fail-on-error exists but isn't wired to the wcagContrast gate in the launch calendar. contrast-audit-owl is an Owl-species Koma that runs the audit, parses the results, writes a receipt, and (via gate-sync-ant) flips wcagContrast to passed or blocked with the exact ratio and token path. Should run in CI on every token change.
